raw_consumer_statement: I filed a complaint with cfpb XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank was notified and a temp credit was applied to the credit card pending review. After multiple calls and multiple bills, the credit has been removed and they are charging me for the transaction along with late fees. I did everything I could do starting from the immediate notification to Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX reporting the fraudulent transaction. I did not authorize the charge, I did not make the charge, i called Citibank multiple times and they dont seem to care that I immediately called to report the fraudulent charge when I was notified of the transaction while in XXXX XXXX insisting I am responsible. Please help me.
